title: Croatian Vegetable Flatbread
description: A rustic Croatian-inspired flatbread topped with a variety of sautéed vegetables and perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 2. Slice the flatbread into 1-inch (2.5 cm) thick slices.
3. Brush the flatbread slices with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
4. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
5. Add the chopped onion, garlic, bell pepper, and zucchini, and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the chopped tomato and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
7. Brush the flatbread slices with the remaining 2 tablespoons of olive oil and place on a baking sheet.
8. Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
9. Remove the flatbread from the oven and top with the sautéed vegetables.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
